Game.Name: Super H.Q. - Criminal Chaser (Japan)
Game.plot: Super Chase H.Q. is a Driving game, developed and published by Taito Corporation,which was released in Japan in 1993.Cheat: Bonus MissionFinish the game without using a continue before Mission 5 and you'll play a bonus mission during the ending. However in the Japanese version, this bonus mission will appear only if you beat the game on Hard mode. That means you will have to beat the game twice.Cheat: Bonus MissionJust beat the game and the hard mode will be available.
